posts.author: CraftySofia92
posts.text: Finally finished my latest pottery wheel project! It's a small bowl with a textured rim, I used a glaze recipe from an old magazine. Can't wait to see how it looks once it dries completely.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about a hobby (pottery) and does not contain threats, private details, or harmful misinformation.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.
